programmes.show_description: Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From AC/DC & Led Zep, to Bowie & Black Sabbath - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Anyone for a bit of Kojak rapping or Hutch singing? TV stars, movie stars & comedians - they all made 70s music (of variable quality), but became better known for something else!

Another batch of silly songs, dodgy videos & novelty hits from the 70s. Yes every one of these was a huge hit!

Pat Man selects 30 chart toppers of the 70s that have probably slipped your mind! Expect lesser remembered hits from Mud, Dr Hook, David Cassidy, Lena Martell & Brotherhood of Man.

programmes.show_name: GBH! Great Brit Hits of the 70s
programmes.show_description: 25 classic hits from the Brits - songs that have stood the test of time. Including 10cc, Bryan Ferry, Queen & Kate Bush!
He's sung and played bass with many over the years, but fame came as one of the original Sex Pistols in 1976. Currently with Blondie, Glen picks his 25 punk & new wave favourites.
Non-stop punk and new wave the cool kids were listening to in the latter half of the decade - expect skinny jeans, safety pins, guitars and a few snarls!
Back to the 70s & back to the school disco for some proper full-on guitar action! Including Status Quo, Blondie, AC/DC, Bruce Springsteen & Queen.
Non-stop 70s rock and power ballads - all day!
Mark Goodier brings you our exclusive chart of the 100 biggest rock songs of the 70s, based on streaming data, historic sales info, and enduring global appeal. Crank this up LOUD!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
What 70s songs have streamed over a billion times worldwide? There are lots from Rumours & Queen's Greatest, but the songs at 4, 9, 12 & 18 might surprise you!
